name: ReefDash
postStartCommand:
sed -i 's|/var/www/html|/workspaces/reefdash|g' /etc/apache2/sites-available/000-default.conf && sed -i 's|DirectoryIndex index.php index.html|DirectoryIndex fish_tank_dashboard.php index.php index.html|' /etc/apache2/mods-available/dir.conf && echo '<Directory /workspaces/reefdash>
  Options Indexes FollowSymLinks
  AllowOverride None
  Require all granted
</Directory>' >> /etc/apache2/apache2.conf && a2enmod dir && chmod -R 755 /workspaces/reefdash && service apache2 start
